primary_drivers: Major FTC complaints and injunctions (e.g., complaint for permanent injunction)
High‑profile merger reviews/blocks (OkCupid/Match; healthcare merger intervention)

response.explainer: Critical heat reflects a cluster of high‑impact FTC enforcement actions and litigation this quarter — major complaints, injunctions, consent orders, merger interventions, and broad investigations.
